cards.title: Immune Architecture & Mechanisms
cards._legacyHtml:

  • Innate vs adaptive immunity overview

cards.title: Botanicals & Autoimmune Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Immune modulators: Astragalus, Medicinal mushrooms (Reishi, Turkey tail)
  • Autoimmune protocol (AIP) diet: 30-day elimination
  • Low-dose naltrexone (LDN) for autoimmunity
  • Histamine intolerance: DAO enzyme, low-histamine diet
